name: perform-trailing-chord-invariant
note: Codex finding (PR #302 review, SHA 237a56c) + CORE INVARIANT goalpost: a SHORT lyric with a TRAILING WIDE CHORD ('la la [Gmaj7add13sus4]') must never overflow the Perform sheet sideways - the wrap decision and split loop key on max(chordRow, lyricRow), and the wrap boundary must not EAT a chord character (pre-fix the boundary-space drop rendered Gmaj7add13sus4 as Gmaj7a|d13sus4, one d lost). The invariant is asserted at the auto-fit default, at the pinch-to-max size (which forces the trailing-chord line itself to wrap), through A- steps (which must be strictly monotonic from the effective scale - the A- bug), and across a landscape rotation. NO row - .lyrLine or .chordOnly - may ever exceed the sheet's padding-aware content width; .pSheet overflow-x is hidden.

seed.roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1: [{"id":"trailchord","t":"Trailing Chord Song","a":"Me","y":2026,"d":"Mine","custom":true,"forkOf":"k1","seq":["C","F"],"sheet":[["Verse","la la [Gmaj7add13sus4]"],["Verse","sing one [C] two [Gmaj7add13] three"],["Chorus","a longer sung line that runs and runs to force wrapping [F] on [Bbmaj7add13]"]]}]

steps.label: open (auto-fit): the long chorus floors the scale at 0.8 and wraps; NO row overflows the content width; the full trailing chord Gmaj7add13sus4 renders with no character lost
PINCH OUT to the 2.2 cap: the short-lyric + trailing-wide-chord line now exceeds the budget and must WRAP (row count grows) - pre-fix it rendered unwrapped and the chord overflowed sideways
at 2.2: STILL no row overflows (the wrapped trailing chord honors the budget) and STILL no chord character lost across the wrap boundary
column alignment survives the trailing-chord wrap: every sampled chord character sits in the same pixel column as the lyric character below it
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)continue;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)continue;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>0;})()

steps.label: A- BUG FIX: three A- presses each yield a STRICTLY smaller effective --pscale (stepping from the effective scale, never a stale baseline that could render A- bigger)
steps.js: (function(){var btn=document.getElementById('pFontDown');var sheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');function sc(){return parseFloat(getComputedStyle(sheet).getPropertyValue('--pscale'));}var s0=sc();for(var i=0;i<3;i++){var before=sc();btn.click();var after=sc();if(!(after<before-0.001))return false;}return sc()<s0-0.2;})()

steps.label: after A- x3: no row overflows, chord text still intact
A+ x3 mirrors back up (strictly larger each press, capped at 2.2), still no overflow
steps.js: (function(){var btn=document.getElementById('pFontUp');var sheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');function sc(){return parseFloat(getComputedStyle(sheet).getPropertyValue('--pscale'));}for(var i=0;i<3;i++){var before=sc();btn.click();var after=sc();if(before<2.19&&!(after>before+0.001))return false;if(after>2.201)return false;}var cs=getComputedStyle(sheet);var avail=sheet.clientWidth-(parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft)||0)-(parseFloat(cs.paddingRight)||0);var rows=sheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine,.chordOnly');for(var j=0;j<rows.length;j++){if(rows[j].scrollWidth>avail+1)return false;}return true;})()

steps.label: landscape: no row overflows the padding-aware content width and none runs under the .pNav column; chord text intact
back to portrait: invariant still holds (re-fit + re-wrap on the width change)
